== Notes for [[Item:Q105458|Q105458]] ==

* [https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+1&version=KJV Matthew 1:14-15]

Wikipedia: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:14 1:14] - [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:15 1:15]

Mat 1:14, 15

Mat 1:14, 15

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008784827531

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
